seoTitle: Change Your Phone Number in QuickBooks Online
metaDescription: How to update both your customer-facing company phone number and your Intuit Account security phone number in QuickBooks Online.
intro: QuickBooks Online actually stores two different phone numbers — the public one that prints on your invoices, and the private one tied to your account's two-factor security. This guide covers updating both, since they live in separate settings menus.

steps.heading: Open Account and Settings
steps.body: Click the Gear icon in the upper right and select Account and Settings.

steps.heading: Edit your company phone number
steps.body: On the default Company tab, click the Edit pencil, find the Company phone number field, and type your new customer-facing number.

steps.heading: Save the public update
steps.body: Click Save, then Done, to update the number that prints on your invoices and sales forms.

steps.heading: Open your Intuit Account
steps.body: Click your profile icon and select Manage your Intuit Account, then go to the Sign in & security tab.

steps.heading: Update your security phone number
steps.body: Find the Phone row, click Change, enter your new number and password to authorize the edit, then complete the two-factor SMS verification.

faq.question: Why are there two different phone number settings?
faq.answer: One is your public business number shown to customers on invoices, and the other is your private security number used for account verification.

faq.question: Will updating the security phone number affect other Intuit apps?
faq.answer: Yes, since your Intuit Account is shared across products, that number update applies to your entire account security profile.

faq.question: Do I need to update both numbers, or just one?
faq.answer: It depends on your goal — update the company number if it's for customer-facing forms, and the security number if you're changing your verification device.

faq.question: What if I don't receive the verification code?
faq.answer: Double-check that the number you're updating from is still active and able to receive SMS messages.
